he0763410gafabg4bf9gbcb1g2f4e15c31d06: *Through music and vision, the sovereign reveals the truth of the fungal creature before you.*
hfbecb144gbe38g45eeg8e56g56f71726a94b: *You see a frothing duergar, axe drawn, crazed by bloodlust, bearing down on a young myconid.*
h699b638fgaf46g4645g9ad3g07d02240d10c: *The frightened myconid circle conjures mildewed vines. They encircle and transform the duergar.*
h83f108e2ga519g47bagb048g49e8f7e2b9db: *It now belongs to the circle. It will obey the sovereign.*
haf94eb73g0352g47f2g8f12g77f8d4485ded: Attack the circle. No duergar deserves this fate.
h0c9fce9dgf0c9g4568gb360g774a4529f66d: *The servant says what it can: absolutely nothing.*
